name: Salmon Steaks with Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place salmon steaks in a microwave-safe browning dish. Cook on high for 3 minutes.
2. Add cooking oil to the browning dish and swirl to coat.
3. Cover the dish with its lid, add the salmon steaks, and cook for 30 seconds.
4. Turn the salmon steaks and cook covered for another 3 minutes or until they flake easily with a fork.
5. Let the salmon stand while preparing the wine sauce.
6. For the wine sauce, melt butter in a microwave-safe measuring cup on high for 45 seconds to 1 minute.
7. Stir in cornstarch and white pepper. Add half & half cream and cook until thickened and bubbly, stirring every minute.
8. Mix some of this hot cream mixture into the egg yolk.
9. Return all sauce ingredients back together and cook on low for 1 minute, stirring every 15 seconds.
10. Stir in dry white wine and serve the salmon steaks topped with the sauce.
11. Garnish with seedless green grapes if desired.
